title: symphyotrichum ericoides var. prostratum
intro: Symphyotrichum ericoides var. prostratum, also known as creeping white aster, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and soothing irritated skin. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum ericoides var. prostratum include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable remedy for various skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
